title: The Butterfly Man
director: Louis J. Gasnier, Ida May Park
writer: George Barr McCutcheon, Ida May Park
actors: Lew Cody, Louise Lovely, Lila Leslie
plot: Sedgewick Blynn is a gigolo--albeit a broke one--determined to marry into money, no matter what it takes. One evening he saves a young child from burning to death in a fire and is hailed as a hero. Young heiress Bessie Morgan fall...
